markers.name: The Iron Citadel
markers.description: Morneven Institute primary HQ. Full services and resupply available.

markers.name: Scorched Wastes
markers.description: DL-4 anomaly hot zone. No solo approach.

markers.name: Choir Substrate
markers.description: Confirmed Hollow Choir presence. Access prohibited.

markers.name: Forbidden Sector 7
markers.description: Annihilation Pattern Theta containment. No living personnel sanctioned to enter the inner ring.

markers.name: Logistics Bay 4 - The Pantry
markers.description: Citadel cold-storage and Secret-box distribution hub. Frequent Sola visits.

markers.name: Mechanic Bay 11 - The Playroom
markers.description: Mecha integration line. Standing Secret-box carry rule in effect.

markers.name: Tideglass Migration Corridor
markers.description: Known Tideglass Leviathan migration corridor. Shipping lanes routed around. DL-5.

markers.name: Heliograph Plateau East
markers.description: Active Heliograph Spire cluster. Stay clear of beam vectors at violet dawn.

markers.name: Stellar Anchor (Orbital)
markers.description: Geostationary platform hosting Solar's Lens. Permanently uncrewed. Approach treated as hostile.
